name: @act-spec/example-706-hybrid-static-runtime-mcp
description: PRD-706 reference example: hybrid static + runtime + MCP bridge. Composes @act-spec/cli (PRD-409) for the static /marketing mount, @act-spec/runtime-next (PRD-501) for the runtime /app mount, and @act-spec/mcp-bridge (PRD-602) wrapping both as MCP resources under one act:// URI namespace. Exercises mounts composability, two-principal probe on the runtime mount, and the MCP enumeration probe per PRD-706 acceptance criterion (e).

scripts.test: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-706-hybrid-static-runtime-mcp: example exercises end-to-end via conformance')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-706-hybrid-static-runtime-mcp: lint covered by typecheck + conformance')"
